summary: TP Prefill GEMM implementation correctly implements column-parallel and row-parallel projections for tensor-parallel inference.

notes: Column-parallel FFN gate/up projections correctly shard output dimensions across GPUs
Row-parallel FFN down projection with allreduce correctly aggregates partial outputs
Weight sharding matches decode path expectations
Good use of local_inter variable for clarity
val_m4_tp_prefill.py tests infrastructure and weight sharding
Tests validate TP size, allreduce initialization, and method existence

sharedStateObservations.description: TP prefill uses per-token RMSNorm followed by batched GEMM for seq_len >= 32, falls back to per-token GEMV for shorter sequences
TP allreduce uses fallback chain: ring_allreduce -> fused_p2p_reduce -> p2p_ar
